generated_oml:
// C3: Physical Sensing Components
instance HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Hokuyo UST-10LX LiDAR for 3D environment mapping and object detection in the autonomous vehicle system."
    DTDFVocab:producedData LiDARPointCloudDataTransmitted
]

instance IntelDeepsenseD435iCamera : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Intel Deepsense D435i Depth Camera for visual perception and object tracking in the autonomous vehicle system."
    DTDFVocab:producedData CameraDepthDataTransmitted
]

instance VehicleStateSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Vehicle state sensors providing speed, steering angle, and other ego-vehicle metrics."
    DTDFVocab:producedData VehicleStateDataTransmitted
]

// C4: Physical-to-Virtual Interaction
instance LiDARPointCloudDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR
]

instance CameraDepthDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IntelDeepsenseD435iCamera
]

instance VehicleStateDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VehicleStateSensor
]

instance ProcessedObjectTracksDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR, IntelDeepsenseD435iCamera
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance PointCloudClusteringModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Uses DBSCAN for clustering LiDAR point clouds to identify object clusters in the environment."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkEnabler
]

instance KalmanFilterTrackingModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kalman filter implementation for tracking object states (position, velocity) from clustered point clouds."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkEnabler
]

instance ACCControlModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Implements performance class I ACC (ISO 15622) with lead vehicle detection and speed adjustment logic."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo NVIDIAJetpack50SDK
]

instance RealTime3DVisualizationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Renders ego-vehicle state, object tracks, and projected driving path in real-time using ROS2 visualization tools."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo OpenGLRendererEnabler
]

instance EgoVehicleStateData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Timeseries data of ego-vehicle metrics including speed, steering angle, and sensor fusion outputs."
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleStateDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataTranslationEnabler, SQLDatabaseEnabler
]

instance ObjectTracksData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "ID-assigned object tracks with state estimates (position, velocity) for proximity entities."
    DTDFVocab:fromData ProcessedObjectTracksDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataTranslationEnabler, SQLDatabaseEnabler
]

instance RawLiDARPointCloudData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Pre-processed LiDAR point clouds from Hokuyo UST-10LX before clustering and tracking."
    DTDFVocab:fromData LiDARPointCloudDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PointCloudClusteringModel
]

instance CameraDepthData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Depth data from Intel Deepsense D435i camera for visual perception and sensor fusion."
    DTDFVocab:fromData CameraDepthDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PointCloudClusteringModel
]

// C11: Enablers
instance ROS2Middleware : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS2 (Robot Operating System 2) for intra-entity communication, node lifecycle management, and message passing between components."
]

instance NVIDIAJetpack50SDK : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetpack 5.0 SDK for programming the NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano microcomputer and hardware acceleration."
]

instance Python38Enabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python 3.8 for rapid prototyping of ROS2 nodes and data processing scripts."
]

instance CppEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "C++ for performance-critical ROS2 nodes and real-time control logic."
]

instance MATLABSimulinkEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink for complex systems like point cloud processing and model-based design."
]

instance DataTranslationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Data Translation FE for serialization, unit conversion, and message alignment between physical and digital twins."
]

instance SQLDatabaseEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SQL database for structured storage of timeseries data and historical records."
]

instance OpenGLRendererEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "OpenGL-based renderer for 3D visualization of vehicle state and object tracks."
]

instance WiFiCommunicationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Wi-Fi protocol for inter-entity communication between Digital Twin Entity and Physical Twin Entity."
]

instance DataPreProcessingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Pre-processing of raw sensor data (LiDAR, camera) before transmission to Digital Twin Entity."
]

instance ActuationControlEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Control interface for motor and steering actuation commands."
]

// C6: Services
instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of ego-vehicle state (speed, steering angle), object tracks, and projected driving path."
]

instance ComputationOffloadingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Execution of ACC logic (lead vehicle detection, speed computation) in Digital Twin Entity to reduce load on vehicle hardware."
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Enables operators to enable/disable ACC, set desired speed, and trigger emergency braking."
]

instance ReportingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Generates human-readable timeseries reports of object tracks and vehicle state for post-hoc analysis."
]

instance DataStorageService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "External storage of ego-vehicle state and object tracks in SQL database hosted externally to the vehicle."
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance RealTimeVehicleStateInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Operator insights into current ego-vehicle state including speed and steering angle via 3D visualization."
]

instance ObjectTrackVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Visual representation of detected objects with ID-assigned tracks and state estimates in real-time."
]

instance DrivingPathProjectionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Projection of the vehicle's intended driving path based on ACC logic and object tracks."
]

instance ACCDecisionMakingInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insights into ACC decision-making process including lead vehicle detection and speed adjustment logic."
]

instance TimeseriesReportInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Generated reports providing timeseries analysis of vehicle state and object tracks for performance evaluation."
]

instance HistoricalDataInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Access to stored timeseries data for long-term analysis and predictive maintenance potential."
]

instance ACCControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Enable or disable the Adaptive Cruise Control system remotely."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance DesiredSpeedAdjustmentAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Adjust the desired speed parameter for the ACC system based on operator input."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance EmergencyBrakingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Trigger emergency braking command remotely via Digital Twin System User Interface."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

// C2: Acting Components
instance VedderElectronicSpeedController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Converts desired speed commands into motor voltage commands for vehicle actuation."
]

instance SteeringServoActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Controls steering servo based on commands from Digital Twin Entity via ROS2 nodes."
]

// C1: Physical Twin Components
instance NVIDIAJetsonNXAntenna : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetson NX antenna for wireless communication in the upper-level chassis."
]

instance NVIDIAJetsonOrinNano : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano microcomputer hosting autonomy elements and running NVIDIA Jetpack 5.0."
]

instance LowerLevelChassis : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Lower-level chassis hosting motor actuation and steering servo components."
]

instance UpperLevelChassis : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Upper-level chassis hosting autonomy components including Jetson NX antenna, Jetson Orin Nano, LiDAR, and camera."
]

instance TraxxasSlash4x4Vehicle : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "1/10-scale autonomous vehicle base platform retrofitted with autonomy components."
]

// C5: Environments
instance PhysicalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Physical Twin Entity hosting sensor/actuator interfaces and pre-processing components."
    base:contains NVIDIAJetsonOrinNano, HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR, IntelDeepsenseD435iCamera,
                 VehicleStateSensor, VedderElectronicSpeedController, SteeringServoActuator,
                 DataPreProcessingEnabler, ActuationControlEnabler
]

instance DigitalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Digital Twin Entity hosting ACC logic, data collection, and storage components."
    base:contains ACCControlModel, PointCloudClusteringModel, KalmanFilterTrackingModel,
                 DataTranslationEnabler, SQLDatabaseEnabler, ROS2Middleware
]

instance UserEntity : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "User Entity hosting visualization and control interfaces."
    base:contains RealTime3DVisualizationModel, OpenGLRendererEnabler, WiFiCommunicationEnabler,
                 RemoteManagementService, DataMonitoringService
]

// Relationships
instance ROS2Middleware : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService, DataStorageService
]

instance NVIDIAJetpack50SDK : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    DTDFVocab:enables DataPreProcessingEnabler, ActuationControlEnabler
]

instance Python38Enabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    DTDFVocab:enables DataTranslationEnabler
]

instance CppEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    DTDFVocab:enables ActuationControlEnabler
]

instance MATLABSimulinkEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    DTDFVocab:enables PointCloudClusteringModel, KalmanFilterTrackingModel
]

instance DataTranslationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, DataStorageService
]

instance SQLDatabaseEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    DTDFVocab:enables DataStorageService
]

instance OpenGLRendererEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance WiFiCommunicationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    DTDFVocab:enables RemoteManagementService, DataMonitoringService
]

instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeVehicleStateInsight, ObjectTrackVisualizationInsight, DrivingPathProjectionInsight
]

instance ComputationOffloadingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    DTDFVocab:provides ACCDecisionMakingInsight
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    DTDFVocab:provides ACCControlAction, DesiredSpeedAdjustmentAction, EmergencyBrakingAction
]

instance ReportingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    DTDFVocab:provides TimeseriesReportInsight
]

instance DataStorageService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    DTDFVocab:provides HistoricalDataInsight
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The interactions from the virtual to the physical world include:
  - **Desired speed commands** computed by the **ACC Controlling FE** in the **Digital Twin Entity** and sent back to the **Actuation FE** in the **Physical Twin Entity**.
  - **Remote management commands** (enable/disable ACC, modify desired speed, emergency braking) transmitted via the **User Entity** (Control Panel) to the **Actuation FE**.
  - **Actuation commands** (motor voltage and steering adjustments) executed on the **lower-level chassis** via the **Vedder Electronic Speed Controller** and **steering servo**.
  Communication between entities uses **Wi-Fi** (for inter-entity) and **ROS2** (for intra-entity) with a **maximum end-to-end latency of 100 ms** (per **3GPP TS 22.185**)."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The twinning time-scale is **real-time** with the following constraints:
  - **End-to-end latency** between vehicle and Digital Twin Entity must not exceed **100 ms** (per **3GPP TS 22.185** for V2V communication).
  - **Clock synchronization** across components must be accurate to **±100 ms** (due to hardware limitations; stricter synchronization is mandated in safety-critical applications but not implemented here).
  - **Perception cycle**: Object tracks and vehicle state are updated **continuously** (no explicit frequency specified, but assumed to align with sensor refresh rates, e.g., LiDAR/camera frame rates)."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin constellation is orchestrated as follows:
  - **Architecture**: Based on **ISO 23247 Reference Architecture (RA)** with adaptations:
    - **Physical Twin Entity** (custom addition; encapsulates vehicle-specific resources).
    - **Digital Twin Entity** (hosts ACC logic, data collection, and storage).
    - **User Entity** (split into **3D Visualization** and **Control Panel** sub-FEs).
  - **Deployment**:
    - **Physical Twin Entity**: Deployed on the vehicle’s **NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano** (handles sensor data pre-processing and actuation).
    - **Digital Twin Entity**: Deployed on **external hardware** (cloud/edge) for computation offloading.
    - **User Entity**: Deployed on a **separate UI system** (e.g., laptop/desktop) for operator interaction.
  - **Data Flow**:
    - Sensor data → **Physical Twin Entity** → **Data Translation FE** → **Digital Twin Entity** → **User Entity**.
    - Commands → **User Entity** → **Digital Twin Entity** → **Physical Twin Entity** → **Actuators**.
  - **Synchronization**: Achieved via **ROS2 topics** (intra-entity) and **Wi-Fi** (inter-entity) with **100 ms latency** and **100 ms clock accuracy** constraints."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The DT is primarily used during the **operation phase** of the vehicle lifecycle, supporting **real-time monitoring, remote management, and computation offloading** for the ACC system. During the **design phase**, the DT could theoretically serve as a **cyber-physical experimentation facility** (as referenced in the literature), but this is not explicitly implemented in the case study. The DT covers the **as-operated** representation of the PT, focusing on real-time synchronization with the physical system rather than ideal or manufactured states. The system adheres to **ISO 15622** for ACC functionality, ensuring compliance with operational requirements."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity and validity considerations include:
  - **Real-Time Fidelity**: Achieved via **low-latency communication (≤100 ms)** and **sensor fusion** (LiDAR + camera) for accurate object tracking.
  - **Model Validity**:
    - **Point Cloud Clustering & Tracking**: Validated via **DBSCAN** (for clustering) and **Kalman filter** (for tracking), ensuring accurate state estimates.
    - **ACC Control**: Implements **ISO 15622 performance class I** standards for basic control strategies.
  - **Verification and Validation**:
    - **Latency Testing**: Ensures end-to-end communication meets **3GPP TS 22.185** requirements.
    - **Clock Synchronization**: Validated to **±100 ms** accuracy (hardware-limited).
    - **Data Integrity**: Achieved via **ROS2 message serialization** and **Data Translation FE** for unit conversions.
  - **Uncertainty**: Addressed via **sensor fusion** and **Kalman filtering**, though no explicit uncertainty quantification is detailed in the document."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The technical connection details are:
  - **Network Protocols**:
    - **ROS2** for intra-entity communication (e.g., between **Data Pre-Processing FE** and **Data Collecting FE**).
    - **Wi-Fi** for inter-entity communication (e.g., **Digital Twin Entity ↔ Physical Twin Entity**).
  - **Architecture**:
    - **ROS2 Network**: Used for local (vehicle) communication between nodes.
    - **Wi-Fi Network**: Used for remote (cloud/edge) communication between entities.
  - **Latency Requirements**:
    - **Maximum end-to-end latency**: **100 ms** (per **3GPP TS 22.185** for V2V communication).
    - **Clock Synchronization**: **±100 ms** accuracy across components.
  - **Data Translation**: Handled by the **Data Translation FE**, which serializes data, aligns message types, and performs unit conversions (e.g., converting motor voltage commands to ROS2 message formats)."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The **Physical Twin Entity** is deployed on the PT’s **NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano**, hosting sensor data processing (e.g., point cloud tracking) and actuation commands. The **Digital Twin Entity** and **User Entity** are hosted on **external hardware** (not specified in the document), enabling computation offloading and remote management. The **Digital Twin Entity** does not use a split architecture (real-time/offline components) as seen in other adaptations of ISO 23247 (e.g., battery systems). Instead, it focuses on **modular ROS2 packages** for scalability."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "Horizontal integration is implied but not explicitly detailed in the document. Potential integration points include **Vehicle-to-Everything (V2X) communication** (e.g., sharing object tracks with other vehicles), **cloud-based fleet coordination** (as mentioned in the abstract), and **digital threads** for end-to-end vehicle lifecycle management. The DT could theoretically interface with **third-party APIs** (e.g., mapping services, traffic data) or **manufacturing systems** (if extended beyond ACC). However, no specific integration mechanisms are described."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin follows the following standards:
  - **Architectural Standard**: **ISO 23247 Part 2 (Digital Twin Manufacturing Framework – Reference Architecture)** as the primary reference, with adaptations for automotive use.
  - **ACC Standard**: **ISO 15622** for performance class I ACC implementation (basic control strategies).
  - **Communication Standard**: **3GPP TS 22.185** for **Vehicle-to-Vehicle (V2V) latency requirements** (≤100 ms).
  - **Middleware Standard**: **ROS2** for intra-entity communication and node lifecycle management.
  - **Clock Synchronization**: While no specific standard is cited, the **±100 ms accuracy** aligns with general distributed system requirements (though stricter standards like **IEEE 1588** are implied for safety-critical applications)."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "The DT incorporates the following **safety considerations**: **(1) Real-time Constraints**: **100 ms latency** and **clock synchronization** to **100 ms accuracy** ensure timely and coordinated operation, **(2) Human-in-the-Loop**: The system is classified as a **Fully Autonomous Digital Twin with Human-in-the-Loop** (per David and Bork’s taxonomy), **(3) ACC Compliance**: Implementation of **ISO 15622** for **Performance Class I ACC**, **(4) Safety-Critical Design**: The system respects the **safety-critical nature** of automotive applications by offloading computation to reduce on-board ECU burden. **Security considerations** are not explicitly detailed in the document, though the use of **ROS2** and **Wi-Fi** suggests potential vulnerabilities (e.g., unauthorized access, data tampering) are not addressed. The system does not describe **remote operation safeguards** (e.g., fail-safes for emergency braking) beyond the **100 ms latency** constraint."
]
